author: Ammer Ayach
name: Non-record: FA3 Port on Saved 25.02 Container
blurb: Isolated Session 05 FA3 delta replacing SDPA with direct flash_attn_interface on the pre-TTT anchor. Run on Pegasus 8xH100 SXM5 using a saved NGC 25.02-derived FA3 container. Operationally correct but slower end-to-end than the SDPA anchor.
